title: Ultrahuman’s New App Fixes Most of What Frustrated Me About the Old One
summary: When I first reviewed an Ultrahuman ring (the Ring Air , last year), I wrote that my biggest complaint was that I found the app overbearing. But a new version of the app—Ultrahuman is calling it the Emerald Update—changes everything.
